titles.text: おとぎストーリー 天使のしっぽ

descriptions.text: 日本のメディアミックス作品
série de televisão de anime japonesa

Angel Tales (Japanese: おとぎストーリー 天使のしっぽ, Hepburn: Otogi Story Tenshi no Shippo) is a Japanese anime television series animated by Tōkyō Kids. The series was broadcast by the anime television network, Animax across its respective networks worldwide, including Southeast Asia, East Asia and South Asia, in English and other languages.
The series was licensed for distribution by Bandai Entertainment in North America.
